romantic: Challenge: Maintain eye contact for 60 seconds without speaking.
Challenge: Write a short love note and place it somewhere your partner will find later.
Challenge: Recreate the moment you first said 'I love you' to each other.
Challenge: Slow dance together in the living room with no music playing.
Challenge: Spend five minutes sharing everything you love about your partner's hands.
Challenge: Give your partner a massage focusing only on their shoulders and neck.
Challenge: Whisper three things you admire about your partner into their ear.
Challenge: Plan a future date night together and write down every detail.
Challenge: Trace a message on your partner's back and have them guess what it says.
Challenge: Hold hands and take turns describing your favourite memory together.
Challenge: Stand facing each other and share one vulnerable thought you have never said aloud.
Challenge: Brush or style your partner's hair gently for two minutes.
Challenge: Make your partner's favourite warm drink and serve it to them without being asked.
Challenge: Look through old photos together and share what you felt in each moment.
Challenge: Spend three minutes giving each other compliments without repeating any.
Challenge: Kiss every part of your partner's face before returning to their lips.
Challenge: Read a love poem aloud while your partner listens with their eyes closed.
Challenge: Wrap your partner in a blanket and hold them without speaking for two minutes.
Challenge: Tell your partner one thing you want to experience together in the next year.
Challenge: Create a shared playlist of songs that remind you of your relationship.
playful: Challenge: Try to make each other laugh without making a sound — first to break loses.
Challenge: Do your best impression of your partner and see if they can guess the scenario.
Challenge: Have a tickle fight until someone calls a safe word.
Challenge: Build a pillow fort together and take a selfie inside it.
Challenge: Speak in an accent for the next three minutes — if you break character, you lose.
Challenge: Let your partner draw a silly face on a piece of paper taped to your forehead.
Challenge: Create a handshake routine and perform it five times without messing up.
Challenge: Sing a romantic song to your partner in the silliest voice you can manage.
Challenge: Have a staring contest — the loser has to do a funny dance.
Challenge: Take turns feeding each other a snack while blindfolded.
Challenge: Make up a short rap about your relationship and perform it together.
Challenge: Dress each other in the silliest outfit combo you can find in the house.
Challenge: Have a paper plane contest — loser owes the winner a back rub.
Challenge: Tell a joke and your partner must rate it — if below 7/10, tell another.
Challenge: Recreate a famous movie scene using only props within arm's reach.
Challenge: Balance a book on your head while walking across the room — partner times you.
Challenge: Talk without moving your lips for one minute and see if your partner understands.
Challenge: Let your partner give you a silly hairstyle and wear it for the next round.
Challenge: Hop on one foot while answering three questions your partner asks.
Challenge: Act out an animal and let your partner guess what it is — swap after each guess.
spicy: Challenge: Spend five minutes exploring each other without using your hands.
Challenge: Whisper exactly what you would like to do to your partner later tonight.
Challenge: Kiss your partner's neck and shoulders for two minutes without stopping.
Challenge: Remove one piece of clothing from your partner using only your mouth.
Challenge: Blindfold your partner and trace slow kisses down their body.
Challenge: Take turns describing a fantasy using only three sentences each.
Challenge: Sit on your partner's lap and find a comfortable position to stay in for five minutes.
Challenge: Kiss from your partner's lips down to their collarbone and back up again.
Challenge: Massage your partner using oil or lotion for five minutes anywhere they choose.
Challenge: Press your body against your partner's from behind and hold for 30 seconds.
Challenge: Give your partner a slow kiss that lasts at least 20 seconds.
Challenge: Trace a path with your tongue from your partner's ear to their shoulder.
Challenge: Straddle your partner and whisper something bold directly into their ear.
Challenge: Let your partner tie your hands lightly with a scarf or tie for the next challenge.
Challenge: Kiss your partner's inner wrist and hold eye contact while you do it.
Challenge: Take turns breathing slowly and deliberately into each other's mouths without kissing.
Challenge: Rub your partner's thighs slowly while maintaining eye contact for one minute.
Challenge: Lie on top of your partner and feel each other's breath sync for two minutes.
Challenge: Nibble your partner's earlobe and whisper what you love about their body.
Challenge: Remove your partner's shirt slowly using only one hand.
